response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and cloud engineering skills with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work. While his experience with production-grade AI solutions is limited compared to the 8-year requirement, his leadership in technical projects, open-source contributions, and mentorship align well with the staff-level role. His diverse background suggests adaptability, but deeper GenAI/RAG expertise needs validation.
strengths: Proven leadership in technical projects (e.g., GISCollective, MCP frameworks) and mentorship (workshops, talks).
Hands-on experience with cloud platforms (AWS) and modern languages (TypeScript, Python-adjacent via DLang).
Strong open-source contributions and full-stack development, indicating adaptability to complex systems.
concerns: Limited explicit experience with production-grade AI/GenAI systems (only ~1 year at re:cinq).
No mention of vector databases or RAG architectures in resume, despite their criticality to the role.
Broad but shallow expertise across many domains may dilute focus on core AI/cloud responsibilities.
